ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transportation_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario (e.g., Census 2011, Government Target) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario detailing its relevance */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset entry */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario this data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for the scenario */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area (e.g., city, state) */,
  "cyclists_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of cyclists in this scenario */,
  "walking_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of walkers in this scenario */,
  "car_drivers_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of car drivers in this scenario */,
  "other_modes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of other transportation modes in this scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_data_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES transportation_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode (e.g., cyclists, walking, car drivers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description detailing the characteristics of the mode */,
  "is_sustainable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mode is sustainable */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the mode */,
  "emissions_per_km" REAL /* Emissions per kilometer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative (e.g., 'Go Dutch', 'E-bikes') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative and its goals */,
  "target_percentage" REAL /* Target percentage for the specific mode under this initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode the initiative targets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_initiatives_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
